steps.title: Set up earnings for each work segment
steps.content:
Alicia's total earnings come from two segments:
  • First 8 hours at regular rate: $8p$
  • Remaining $10 - 8 = 2$ hours at overtime rate: $2(1.5p) = 3p$

steps.title: Solve for the regular hourly wage
steps.content:
Total earnings equal the sum of both segments: $$8p + 3p = 156.75$$
Combine like terms: $$11p = 156.75$$
Divide by 11: $$p = \frac{156.75}{11} = 14.25$$
Alicia's regular hourly wage is \$14.25. B is correct.
